overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through Night City during a heavy rainstorm at night. The journey begins under a red-lit Arasaka corporate overpass, continues through a concrete tunnel, and navigates neon-soaked urban streets with cyberpunk architecture and wet reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with corporate Arasaka signage

events.description: vehicle accelerates from low speed under the red-lit overpass
approaching tunnel entrance with changing light conditions ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-soaked urban underpass with heavy red neon lighting and prominent Arasaka branding visible ahead

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate logo on building facade at end of underpass
massive concrete overpass structure overhead with red neon accents
horizontal red neon lighting running along the underpass walls
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates through a rain-soaked urban underpass dominated by red neon lighting and the prominent Arasaka corporate logo visible in the distance. The camera captures the wet reflective asphalt and concrete pillars while approaching a tunnel entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete vehicle tunnel with linear overhead lighting

events.description: entering enclosed tunnel from open underpass, lighting shifts to artificial yellow-white
approaching tunnel exit with bright daylight glow visible at the end

agents.ego_description: navigating through a concrete tunnel with artificial linear lighting and smooth walls

entered.detail: smooth concrete walls of the vehicle tunnel with horizontal construction lines
recessed linear lights running along the tunnel ceiling providing artificial illumination

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow concrete tunnel, transitioning from the red neon underpass to artificial yellow-white lighting. The smooth tunnel walls pass by as the vehicle approaches the bright exit at the far end where daylight and rain are visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street with neon signage and distant city skyline visible through rain

events.description: exiting tunnel back into open air with heavy rain falling on windshield
navigating turn at intersection while driving on wet reflective roads
entering industrial district area with warehouse-style buildings and less dense neon

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-soaked city streets with neon reflections on wet pavement, distant skyline visible ahead

entered.detail: visible night sky with heavy rain falling, no longer covered by overpass
tall illuminated skyscrapers visible in the far distance through the rain haze
various colored neon signs attached to building facades at street level
large boxy industrial buildings with minimal windows and flat roofs

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the vehicle emerges into open air with heavy rain visible against the night sky. The distant city skyline glows through the haze while the vehicle navigates wet streets lined with neon signs, transitioning into an industrial warehouse district.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial and industrial mixed urban area with graffiti and street-level shops

events.description: navigating sharp turn through industrial area with graffiti-covered walls visible
slowing at intersection with traffic signals and crosswalk markings
pedestrian becomes visible standing on sidewalk near commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating through urban intersections and streets, making several turns through commercial and industrial areas with occasional pedestrians visible

notable_agents.action: standing on sidewalk near building entrance wearing light-colored clothing

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and street art tags
ground-level shops with illuminated signs and display windows
hanging traffic lights showing red and green signals at intersections
crossroads with marked lanes and pedestrian crosswalks

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through a mixed industrial-commercial area featuring graffiti-covered walls and street-level shops. After navigating several intersections with traffic signals, a pedestrian becomes visible standing on the sidewalk as the vehicle approaches a more commercial district with storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey that transitions from a red-lit corporate underpass through a sterile tunnel and into a rain-drenched industrial district. It begins by accelerating through a rain-soaked urban underpass where red neon lighting and the Arasaka logo reflect off the wet asphalt. As the vehicle moves forward, the scene shifts into a narrow concrete tunnel, replacing the red glow with artificial yellow-white lighting that streaks across the smooth walls. The camera then emerges from the tunnel's bright exit into the open night air, where heavy rain falls against a glowing city skyline. Finally, the view expands across wet streets lined with neon signs as the vehicle navigates toward a dark industrial warehouse district.

The shot follows a continuous drive through a gritty urban corridor that transitions from a weathered industrial zone into a denser commercial district. It begins by gliding past graffiti-covered walls and street-level shops within a mixed-use industrial area. As the vehicle navigates a series of intersections and traffic signals, the surrounding architecture gradually shifts toward a more developed commercial aesthetic. The scene then opens up to reveal a row of bright storefronts, passing a lone pedestrian standing on the sidewalk as the journey pushes deeper into the city's commercial heart.
